items.summary: Remove the permission check that blocks non-admin users from adding team members in the backend. The `addTeamMember` function should allow any authenticated caller to add a team member without role-based restriction.

Update the `AddUserModal` component to remove any frontend-side permission guard or error display (the 'You do not have permission to add team members' message). The modal should show only the clean form with Name, Email ID, and Role fields, plus Cancel and Add Member buttons.
